title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: CENTRAL HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1601 Monmouth Street Independence, OR 97351 Eligibility: Serves the entire community, with Central School District students as its priority Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 838-0045 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 838-0045 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Polk County Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER
